scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n "BACK,FRONT,MAP" -c "blue,green,magenta" "npm --prefix innofaso-backend/backend run dev" "npm --prefix innofaso-frontend run dev" "npm --prefix map run dev"
scripts.install:all: npm --prefix innofaso-backend/backend install && npm --prefix innofaso-frontend install && npm --prefix map install
